body:
Hey Amara, hope you had a good Thanksgiving week — I know things tend to get a bit scattered around the holiday. I wanted to follow up on our conversation from a couple weeks back about [Verdant Grid](companies/verdant-grid) and whether [Halfway Capital](funds/halfway-capital) might have appetite for their seed round. I've been spending more time with the founding team and I have to say, their approach to distributed energy resource orchestration is genuinely differentiated — this isn't just another virtual power plant wrapper. I think the timing is interesting given what's happening with FERC Order 2222 implementation across the mid-Atlantic markets. Would love to get on a call this week or next to give you a proper rundown before they close out the round — let me know what works on your end.

— Omar
